raw_consumer_statement:
I used my Barclays Credit Card to Purchase a Suit on XXXX The Suit Coat Stitching feel apart after 1 Dinner party The Mechant accepted my request for a return after being presented with Pictures of the Defective Suit Coat.

Initially Barclays refunded my purchase price.

Ignoring my claim that the Suit was DEFECTIVE Barclay Sided with the Merchant based upon the Suit having been altered which is against the Return Policy of the unscrupolous Merchant I tried
explaining this the Barclay 's Office of the President and was told about the dispute being settled in favor of the Merchant The stitching failed after only one use, clearly making the item not of acceptable quality/ not fit for purpose. This is not a case of buyers remorse or late returnit is a case of a defective product.

A return policy does not negate my consumer rights or Barclays obligations under [ Section 75 of the Consumer Credit Act/ XXXX chargeback rules ].

The Merchant has my {$1300.00} and the Defective Suit I need your confirmatino that Barclays is obligated to protect me from Defective Product RE : Case ID : XXXX Disputed Transaction with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$1300.00} To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to reassert my dispute of the {$1300.00} transaction with XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, dated XX/XX/year>, charged to my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. 

The product I received a suit was defective : the quality was that of a Rejected Suit and after only one wear, the seams came apart, rendering it unusable and unfit for its intended purpose. I contacted the merchant and was provided with a Return Shipping Label.

The merchants response does not address the defective nature of the product. I am including the following supporting documentation : A signed statement ( this letter ) explaining the nature of the defect.

Photos showing the lack of quality of the Suit and its seams.

As the product is defective I respectfully request Barclays reinstate the credit under my cardholder protections.

The Merchant has the Suit and my {$1300.00} I have attached the response from Barclays office of the President That did not take into account that the Merchant 's Product is Defective
